name: teal_wave_ribbons_loop
title: Abstract teal light waves seamless loop motion background, glowing ribbons and particles gently undulating over dark navy backdrop with empty space
keywords: motion background, abstract background, seamless loop, looping, animation, video background, backdrop, technology, teal, glowing, wave, particles, futuristic, digital, energy, flowing, dark background, cyan, presentation, website header, screensaver
positive: Abstract motion background. Broad luminous ribbons of teal and cyan light sweep in large continuous waves against a deep dark navy void, swelling and receding like a glowing ocean breathing, rising high and sinking low in a strong rhythmic pulse that never stops and never travels in one direction. Bright glowing particles swirl around the ribbons in wide circular orbits, flaring and dimming as they move. The waves ripple energetically across the upper frame at all times, constantly changing shape. The lower third of the frame remains a smooth featureless dark navy gradient, completely plain and empty. Static locked-off camera, vivid perpetual motion, soft cinematic glow, elegant premium technology aesthetic.
